ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employers" (
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for employer login */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the employer's account is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employer who posted the job */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary offered for the job */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Experience required for the job */,
  "posting_status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., active, closed, draft) */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting applications */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the job posting has been viewed */,
  "applications_count" INTEGER /* Number of applications received for the job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job posting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job posting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_employer_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_id") REFERENCES employers ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job posting being applied for */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "applicant_email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume of the applicant */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter of the applicant */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, reviewed, rejected, accepted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job posting requiring the skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_ranges" (
  "salary_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary range */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job posting with the salary range */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the job */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the job */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary range was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_ranges_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience_levels" (
  "experience_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience level */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job posting with the experience level */,
  "min_experience" REAL /* Minimum experience required for the job */,
  "max_experience" REAL /* Maximum experience required for the job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experience level was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experience level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experience_levels_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)
